scripts.check: concurrently -g -n tsc:aai,tsc:ui,tsc:cli,tsc:tpl,biome,mdlint,test "tsc -p packages/aai/tsconfig.json --noEmit" "tsc -p packages/aai-ui/tsconfig.json --noEmit" "tsc -p packages/aai-cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit" "tsc -p tsconfig.templates.json" "biome check packages/" "markdownlint-cli2 '**/*.md' '#**/node_modules' '#.aai'" "pnpm -r test"
